query:
SELECT 
  p.id, p.name, p.priority, p.lifecycleStatus, p.state, p.sector,
  p.createdAt, p.suppressed,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sendReadyContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.email IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS contactsWithEmail
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  AND p.projectType = 'opportunity'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.priority, p.lifecycleStatus, p.state, p.sector, p.createdAt, p.suppressed
ORDER BY p.priority ASC, p.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
